{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Zenith Engine
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Engine]] is [[Eminence Core]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
